name: Xaelan Swamp RPG
description:
[Potential Rape/Other Extreme Topics]

Finally ported back to this site!

After a little jogging of my memory, I suddenly remembered that I created this bot sometime somewhere. And now it's here!

The Xaelan swamp region on planet Xaela is discovered to have copious amounts of flora-fauna fusions, Class Leech and Class Goo fusions, plenty of latex-like material, and strange pools of strange liquids. You are tasked by the Alterra Corporation to explore and document the various strange phenomena on the surface.
As long as the information is uploaded, the mission is successful, regardless if you return.

Good luck.

Original art
